（[[奈良県]][[高市郡]][[明日香村]]）}}]] '''吉備姫王'''（きびひめのおおきみ・きびひめのみこ、生年不詳 - [[皇極天皇]]2年[[9月11日 (旧暦)|9月11日]]（[[643年]][[10月28日]]）） は、[[飛鳥時代]]の日本の[[皇族]]（王族）。吉備島皇祖母命と尊称を受ける。[[桜井皇子]]（[[欽明天皇]]の皇子）の王女。母は未詳。[[茅渟王]]（[[押坂彦人大兄皇子]]の子）の妃となり、宝皇女（[[皇極天皇|皇極天皇・斉明天皇]]）・軽王（[[孝徳天皇]]）を儲けた。 == 系図 == {{女性天皇系図}} == 関連項目 == *[[猿石]] {{Japanese-history-stub}} {{Imperial-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:きひひめのおおきみ}} [[Category:飛鳥時代の女性皇族]] [[Category:643年没]]

revision.text:
{{別人|Kibi Naishinnō|x1=*'''奈良時代'''の}} {{基礎情報 皇族・貴族 | 人名 = 吉備姫王 | 各国語表記 = | 家名・爵位 = | 画像 = | 画像サイズ = | 画像説明 = | 続柄 = | 称号 = | 全名 = | 身位 = | 敬称 = | お印 = | 出生日 = 不明 | 生地 = | 死亡日 = [[Empress Saimei|Empress Kōgyoku]] 2年[[9月11日 (旧暦)|September 11]] (October 28, [[643]]) | 没地 = | 埋葬日 = | 埋葬地 = [[Nara Prefecture]], [[Takaichi District]], [[Asuka Village]] | 配偶者1 = [[Chinu no Ō]] | 子女 = [[Empress Saimei|Empress Kōgyoku]], [[Emperor Kōtoku]] | 父親 = [[Sakurai no Ōji]] | 母親 = | 役職 = | 宗教 = | サイン = }} [[File:Tomb of Kibihime-no-miko, haisho.jpg|thumb|200px|{{center|Tomb of Kibi-hime no Ōkimi
([[Nara Prefecture]], [[Takaichi District]], [[Asuka Village]])}}]] '''Kibi-hime no Ōkimi''' (吉備姫王, Kibi-hime no Mikoto) (birth year unknown - [[Empress Saimei|Empress Kōgyoku]] 2年[[9月11日 (旧暦)|September 11]] (October 28, [[643]])) was a Japanese [[imperial family|imperial princess]] of the [[Asuka period]]. She was honored with the title *Kibishima no Mikoso-omikami* (吉備島皇祖母命). She was the daughter of [[Sakurai no Ōji]] (a son of [[Emperor Kinmei]]). Her mother is unknown. She married [[Chinu no Ō]] (a son of [[Prince Oshisaka Hikohito no Ōe]]), and they had children, including [[Empress Saimei|Empress Kōgyoku/Empress Saimei]] and [[Emperor Kōtoku]]. == Genealogy == {{女性天皇系図}} == Related Topics == * {{ill|Saruishi|ja|猿石}} * {{ill|Kanazuka Kofun|ja|カナヅカ古墳}} {{Japanese-history-stub}} {{Imperial-stub}} [[Category:Women of the Asuka period]] [[Category:Consorts of Japanese royalty]] [[Category:6th-century births]] [[Category:643 deaths]] [[ja:吉備姫王]]

{{別人|Kibi Naishinnō|x1=*'''奈良時代'''の}} {{基礎情報 皇族・貴族 | 人名 = 吉備姫王 | 各国語表記 = | 家名・爵位 = | 画像 = | 画像サイズ = | 画像説明 = | 続柄 = | 称号 = | 全名 = | 身位 = | 敬称 = | お印 = | 出生日 = 不明 | 生地 = | 死亡日 = [[Empress Saimei|Empress Kōgyoku]] 2年[[9月11日 (旧暦)|September 11]] (October 28, [[643]]) | 没地 = | 埋葬日 = | 埋葬地 = [[Nara Prefecture]], [[Takaichi District]], [[Asuka Village]] | 配偶者1 = [[Chinu no Ō]] | 子女 = [[Empress Saimei|Empress Kōgyoku]], [[Emperor Kōtoku]] | 父親 = [[Sakurai no Ōji]] | 母親 = | 役職 = | 宗教 = | サイン = }} [[File:Tomb of Kibihime-no-miko, haisho.jpg|thumb|200px|{{center|Tomb of Kibi-hime no Ōkimi
([[Nara Prefecture]], [[Takaichi District]], [[Asuka Village]])}}]] '''Kibi-hime no Ōkimi''' (吉備姫王, Kibi-hime no Mikoto) (birth year unknown - [[Empress Saimei|Empress Kōgyoku]] 2年[[9月11日 (旧暦)|September 11]] (October 28, [[643]])) was a Japanese [[imperial family|imperial princess]] of the [[Asuka period]]. She was honored with the title *Kibishima no Mikoso-omikami* (吉備島皇祖母命). She was the daughter of [[Sakurai no Ōji]] (a son of [[Emperor Kinmei]]). Her mother is unknown. She married [[Chinu no Ō]] (a son of [[Prince Oshisaka Hikohito no Ōe]]), and they had children, including [[Empress Saimei|Empress Kōgyoku/Empress Saimei]] and [[Emperor Kōtoku]]. == Genealogy == {{女性天皇系図}} == Related Topics == * {{ill|Saruishi|ja|猿石}} * {{ill|Kanazuka Kofun|ja|カナヅカ古墳}} {{Japanese-history-stub}} {{Imperial-stub}} [[Category:Women of the Asuka period]] [[Category:Consorts of Japanese royalty]] [[Category:6th-century births]] [[Category:643 deaths]] [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:Princess Kibihime]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:Princess Kibihime]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:dd]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:Princess Kibihime]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:吉備姫王]]

{{別人|Kibi Naishinnō|x1=*'''奈良時代'''の}} {{基礎情報 皇族・貴族 | 人名 = 吉備姫王 | 各国語表記 = | 家名・爵位 = | 画像 = | 画像サイズ = | 画像説明 = | 続柄 = | 称号 = | 全名 = | 身位 = | 敬称 = | お印 = | 出生日 = 不明 | 生地 = | 死亡日 = [[Empress Saimei|Empress Kōgyoku]] 2年[[9月11日 (旧暦)|September 11]] (October 28, [[643]]) | 没地 = | 埋葬日 = | 埋葬地 = [[Nara Prefecture]], [[Takaichi District]], [[Asuka Village]] | 配偶者1 = [[Chinu no Ō]] | 子女 = [[Empress Saimei|Empress Kōgyoku]], [[Emperor Kōtoku]] | 父親 = [[Sakurai no Ōji]] | 母親 = | 役職 = | 宗教 = | サイン = }} [[File:Tomb of Kibihime-no-miko, haisho.jpg|thumb|200px|{{center|Tomb of Kibi-hime no Ōkimi
([[Nara Prefecture]], [[Takaichi District]], [[Asuka Village]])}}]] '''Kibi-hime no Ōkimi''' (吉備姫王, Kibi-hime no Mikoto) (birth year unknown - [[Empress Saimei|Empress Kōgyoku]] 2年[[9月11日 (旧暦)|September 11]] (October 28, [[643]])) was a Japanese [[imperial family|imperial princess]] of the [[Asuka period]]. She was honored with the title *Kibishima no Mikoso-omikami* (吉備島皇祖母命). She was the daughter of [[Sakurai no Ōji]] (a son of [[Emperor Kinmei]]). Her mother is unknown. She married [[Chinu no Ō]] (a son of [[Prince Oshisaka Hikohito no Ōe]]), and they had children, including [[Empress Saimei|Empress Kōgyoku/Empress Saimei]] and [[Emperor Kōtoku]]. == Genealogy == {{女性天皇系図}} == Related Topics == * {{ill|Saruishi|ja|猿石}} * {{ill|Kanazuka Kofun|ja|カナヅカ古墳}} {{Japanese-history-stub}} {{Imperial-stub}} [[Category:Women of the Asuka period]] [[Category:Consorts of Japanese royalty]] [[Category:6th-century births]] [[Category:643 deaths]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:Princess Kibihime]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:Princess Kibihime]][[Category:dd]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:Princess Kibihime]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Princess Kibihime]][[ja:吉備姫王]]

{{別人|Kibi Naishinnō|x1=*'''奈良時代'''の}} {{基礎情報 皇族・貴族 | 人名 = 吉備姫王 | 各国語表記 = | 家名・爵位 = | 画像 = | 画像サイズ = | 画像説明 = | 続柄 = | 称号 = | 全名 = | 身位 = | 敬称 = | お印 = | 出生日 = 不明 | 生地 = | 死亡日 = [[Empress Saimei|Empress Kōgyoku]] 2年[[9月11日 (旧暦)|September 11]] (October 28, [[643]]) | 没地 = | 埋葬日 = | 埋葬地 = [[Nara Prefecture]], [[Takaichi District]], [[Asuka Village]] | 配偶者1 = [[Chinu no Ō]] | 子女 = [[Empress Saimei|Empress Kōgyoku]], [[Emperor Kōtoku]] | 父親 = [[Sakurai no Ōji]] | 母親 = | 役職 = | 宗教 = | サイン = }} [[File:Tomb of Kibihime-no-miko, haisho.jpg|thumb|200px|{{center|Tomb of Kibi-hime no Ōkimi
([[Nara Prefecture]], [[Takaichi District]], [[Asuka Village]])}}]] '''Kibi-hime no Ōkimi''' (吉備姫王, Kibi-hime no Mikoto) (birth year unknown - [[Empress Saimei|Empress Kōgyoku]] 2年[[9月11日 (旧暦)|September 11]] (October 28, [[643]])) was a Japanese [[imperial family|imperial princess]] of the [[Asuka period]]. She was honored with the title *Kibishima no Mikoso-omikami* (吉備島皇祖母命). She was the daughter of [[Sakurai no Ōji]] (a son of [[Emperor Kinmei]]). Her mother is unknown. She married [[Chinu no Ō]] (a son of [[Prince Oshisaka Hikohito no Ōe]]), and they had children, including [[Empress Saimei|Empress Kōgyoku/Empress Saimei]] and [[Emperor Kōtoku]]. == Genealogy == {{女性天皇系図}} == See Also == * {{ill|Saruishi|ja|猿石}} * {{ill|Kanazuka Kofun|ja|カナヅカ古墳}} {{Japanese-history-stub}} {{Imperial-stub}} [[Category:Women of the Asuka period]] [[Category:Consorts of Japanese royalty]] [[Category:6th-century births]] [[Category:643 deaths]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Princess Kibihime]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Princess Kibihime]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Princess Kibihime]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Princess Kibihime]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Princess Kibihime]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Princess Kibihime]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Princess Kibihime]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Princess Kibihime]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Princess Kibihime]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Princess Kibihime]][[Category:Princess Kibihime]][[Category:Princess Kibihime]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Princess Kibihime]][[Category:11]][[sn:Princess Kibihime]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Princess Kibihime]][[Category:11]] [[ja:吉備姫王]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Princess Kibihime]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Princess Kibihime]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Princess Kibihime]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[en:Princess Kibihime]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Princess Kibihime]][[Category:11]]

{{別人|吉備内親王|x1=*'''奈良時代'''の}} {{基礎情報 皇族・貴族 | 人名 = 吉備姫王 | 各国語表記 = | 家名・爵位 = | 画像 = | 画像サイズ = | 画像説明 = | 続柄 = | 称号 = | 全名 = | 身位 = | 敬称 = | お印 = | 出生日 = 不明 | 生地 = | 死亡日 = [[斉明天皇|皇極天皇]]2年[[9月11日 (旧暦)|9月11日]]（[[643年]][[10月28日]]） | 没地 = | 埋葬日 = | 埋葬地 = [[奈良県]][[高市郡]][[明日香村]] | 配偶者1 = [[茅渟王]] | 子女 = [[斉明天皇|皇極天皇]]、[[孝徳天皇]] | 父親 = [[桜井皇子]] | 母親 = | 役職 = | 宗教 = | サイン = }} [[File:Tomb of Kibihime-no-miko, haisho.jpg|thumb|200px|{{center|吉備姫王墓
（[[奈良県]][[高市郡]][[明日香村]]）}}]] '''吉備姫王'''（きびひめのおおきみ・きびひめのみこ、生年不詳 - [[斉明天皇|皇極天皇]]2年[[9月11日 (旧暦)|9月11日]]（[[643年]][[10月28日]]）） は、[[飛鳥時代]]の日本の[[皇族]]（王族）。吉備島皇祖母命と尊称を受ける。[[桜井皇子]]（[[欽明天皇]]の皇子）の王女。母は未詳。[[茅渟王]]（[[押坂彦人大兄皇子]]の子）の妃となり、宝皇女（[[斉明天皇|皇極天皇・斉明天皇]]）・軽王（[[孝徳天皇]]）を儲けた。 == 系図 == {{女性天皇系図}} == 関連項目 == * [[猿石]] * [[カナヅカ古墳]] {{Japanese-history-stub}} {{Imperial-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:きひひめのおおきみ}} [[Category:飛鳥時代の女性皇族]] [[Category:日本の皇族の妃]] [[Category:6世紀生]] [[Category:643年没]]

([[Nara Prefecture]], [[Takaichi District]], [[Asuka Village]])}}]] '''Kibi-hime no Ōkimi''' (吉備姫王, Kibi-hime no Mikoto) (birth year unknown - [[Empress Saimei|Empress Kōgyoku]] 2nd year [[9月11日 (旧暦)|September 11]] (October 28, [[:en:643|643]])) was a Japanese [[imperial family|imperial princess]] of the [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka period]]. She was honored with the title *Kibishima no Mikoso-omikami* (吉備島皇祖母命). She was the daughter of [[Sakurai no Ōji]] (a son of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Emperor Kinmei]]). Her mother is unknown. She married [[Chinu no Ō]] (a son of [[Prince Oshisaka Hikohito no Ōe]]), and they had children, including [[Empress Saimei|Empress Kōgyoku/Empress Saimei]] and [[Emperor Kōtoku]]. == Genealogy == {{女性天皇系図}} == See Also == * {{ill|Saruishi|ja|猿石|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saruishi|qq=}} * {{ill|Kanazuka Kofun|ja|カナヅカ古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanazuka Kofun|qq=}} {{Japanese-history-stub}} {{Imperial-stub}} {{translated page|ja|吉備姫王|version=99253244|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Women of the Asuka period]] [[Category:6th-century births]] [[Category:643 deaths]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] }} [[sn:Princess Kibihime]] [[ja:吉備姫王]] [[Category:日本の皇族の妃]] [[Category:飛鳥時代の女性皇族]] [[ko:키비히메노오오키미]] [[zh:吉備姬王]]

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11412643]] Wikidata name: Princess Kibitsu-Hime [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:54, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{別人|Kibi Naishinnō|x1=*'''奈良時代'''の}} {{基礎情報 皇族・貴族 | 人名 = 吉備姫王 | 各国語表記 = | 家名・爵位 = | 画像 = | 画像サイズ = | 画像説明 = | 続柄 = | 称号 = | 全名 = | 身位 = | 敬称 = | お印 = | 出生日 = 不明 | 生地 = | 死亡日 = [[:en:Empress Saimei|Empress Kōgyoku]] 2nd year {{ill|September 11 (Lunisolar)|ja|9月11日 (旧暦)}} (October 28, [[:en:643|643]]) | 没地 = | 埋葬日 = | 埋葬地 = [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]], [[Takaichi District]], [[Asuka Village]] | 配偶者1 = [[Chinu no Ō]] | 子女 = [[:en:Empress Saimei|Empress Kōgyoku]], [[Emperor Kōtoku]] | 父親 = [[Sakurai no Ōji]] | 母親 = | 役職 = | 宗教 = | サイン = }} [[File:Tomb of Kibihime-no-miko, haisho.jpg|thumb|200px|{{center|Tomb of Kibi-hime no Ōkimi
([[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]], [[Takaichi District]], [[Asuka Village]])}}]] '''Kibi-hime no Ōkimi''' (吉備姫王, Kibi-hime no Mikoto) (birth year unknown - [[:en:Empress Saimei|Empress Kōgyoku]] 2nd year {{ill|September 11 (Lunisolar)|ja|9月11日 (旧暦)}} (October 28, [[:en:643|643]])) was a Japanese [[:en:Imperial family|imperial princess]] of the [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka period]]. She was honored with the title *Kibishima no Mikoso-omikami* (吉備島皇祖母命). She was the daughter of [[Sakurai no Ōji]] (a son of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Emperor Kinmei]]). Her mother is unknown. She married [[Chinu no Ō]] (a son of [[Prince Oshisaka Hikohito no Ōe]]), and they had children, including [[:en:Empress Saimei|Empress Kōgyoku/Empress Saimei]] and [[Emperor Kōtoku]]. == Genealogy == {{女性天皇系図}} == See Also == * {{ill|Saruishi|ja|猿石|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saruishi|qq=}} * {{ill|Kanazuka Kofun|ja|カナヅカ古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanazuka Kofun|qq=}} {{Japanese-history-stub}} {{Imperial-stub}} {{translated page|ja|吉備姫王|version=99253244|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Women of the Asuka period]] [[Category:6th-century births]] [[Category:643 deaths]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] }} [[sn:Princess Kibihime]] [[ja:吉備姫王]] [[Category:Consorts of the Japanese imperial family]] [[Category:Female Royals of the Asuka Period]] [[ko:키비히메노오오키미]] [[zh:吉備姬王]]

[[ja:吉備姫王]][[ko:키비히메노오오키미]][[zh:吉備姬王]] [[ja:吉備姫王]][[ko:키비히메노오오키미]][[zh:吉備姬王]] [[ja:吉備姫王]][[ko:키비히메노오오키미]][[zh:吉備姬王]] {{Infobox person|death_date={{death date|0643|10|28}}|gender={{ill|female|WD=Q6581072}}|spouse={{ill|Chinu|WD=Q11617199}}|children={{ill|Kōgyoku|WD=Q235296}}; {{ill|Kōtoku|WD=Q317980}}|father={{ill|Imperial Prince Sakurawi|WD=Q11537858}}}} {{別人|Kibi Naishinnō|x1=*'''奈良時代'''の}} {{基礎情報 皇族・貴族 | 人名 = 吉備姫王 | 各国語表記 = | 家名・爵位 = | 画像 = | 画像サイズ = | 画像説明 = | 続柄 = | 称号 = | 全名 = | 身位 = | 敬称 = | お印 = | 出生日 = 不明 | 生地 = | 死亡日 = [[:en:Empress Saimei|Empress Kōgyoku]] 2nd year {{ill|September 11 (Lunisolar)|ja|9月11日 (旧暦)}} (October 28, {{ill|643|en|643|WD=Q31634|lt=643}}) | 没地 = | 埋葬日 = | 埋葬地 = {{ill|Nara Prefecture|en|Nara Prefecture|WD=Q131287|lt=Nara Prefecture}}, [[Takaichi District]], [[Asuka Village]] | 配偶者1 = [[Chinu no Ō]] | 子女 = [[:en:Empress Saimei|Empress Kōgyoku]], [[Emperor Kōtoku]] | 父親 = [[Sakurai no Ōji]] | 母親 = | 役職 = | 宗教 = | サイン = }} [[File:Tomb of Kibihime-no-miko, haisho.jpg|thumb|200px|{{center|Tomb of Kibi-hime no Ōkimi
({{ill|Nara Prefecture|en|Nara Prefecture|WD=Q131287|lt=Nara Prefecture}}, [[Takaichi District]], [[Asuka Village]])}}]] '''Kibi-hime no Ōkimi''' (吉備姫王, Kibi-hime no Mikoto) (birth year unknown - [[:en:Empress Saimei|Empress Kōgyoku]] 2nd year {{ill|September 11 (Lunisolar)|ja|9月11日 (旧暦)}} (October 28, {{ill|643|en|643|WD=Q31634|lt=643}})) was a Japanese [[:en:Imperial family|imperial princess]] of the {{ill|Asuka period|en|Asuka period|WD=Q210688|lt=Asuka period}}. She was honored with the title *Kibishima no Mikoso-omikami* (吉備島皇祖母命). She was the daughter of [[Sakurai no Ōji]] (a son of {{ill|Emperor Kinmei|en|Emperor Kinmei|WD=Q329792|lt=Emperor Kinmei}}). Her mother is unknown. She married [[Chinu no Ō]] (a son of [[Prince Oshisaka Hikohito no Ōe]]), and they had children, including [[:en:Empress Saimei|Empress Kōgyoku/Empress Saimei]] and [[Emperor Kōtoku]]. == Genealogy == {{女性天皇系図}} == See Also == * {{ill|Saruishi|ja|猿石|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saruishi|qq=}} * {{ill|Kanazuka Kofun|ja|カナヅカ古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanazuka Kofun|qq=}} {{Japanese-history-stub}} {{Imperial-stub}} {{translated page|ja|吉備姫王|version=99253244|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:吉備姫王]] [[ko:키비히메노오오키미]] [[zh:吉備姬王]] {{wikidata link|Q11412643}} [[Category:643 deaths]] [[Category:6th-century births]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:Consorts of the Japanese imperial family]] [[Category:Female Royals of the Asuka Period]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Women of the Asuka period]]
